problem.title: Move Zeroes
problem.description: Given an integer array nums, move all 0's to the end of it while maintaining the relative order of the non-zero elements.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Two Pointers
solutions.description: Use a slow pointer that tracks the next position to write a non-zero element. The fast pointer scans all elements and copies every non-zero value to the slow pointer's position, then advances both. After the scan, fill all remaining positions with zeros. The key insight is that the slow pointer always points to a position that has already been processed, so overwriting it with a non-zero value never loses data.
